_comment: Copy this file to family.local.json (which is gitignored) and fill in real values. The seed scripts read family.local.json. Never commit real names, emails, passwords, or children's information.

kids.name: Child One
kids.notes: Affirming, interest-led, sensory-aware profile the assistant uses as context. Describe the child's interests/strengths first, what helps them, how to handle transitions, and how to connect. If a parent describes a possible diagnosis, write it as a parent observation, not a fact, and never label severity or functioning. Example shape: 'Age N, pronouns. Loves <interest> - this is their strength and the best entry point. Parents describe <possible trait>; not formally diagnosed, so treat as observation. What helps: ... Transitions: ... Connect through ... Sensory: note an amp-down and a heavy-work option. Celebrate effort, not the result.'

kids.name: Child Two
kids.notes: Second child's affirming profile, same shape as above.
